message:
chore: add gitignore pattern for root-level scratch test files

Add /test_*.rs to ignore one-off test scripts that agents create at the
repo root during development sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -122,6 +122,9 @@ vendor/
 # Beads backup/conflict files
 .beads/*.bak_*
 
+# One-off test scripts at repo root
+/test_*.rs
+
 # Agent session ephemeral files
 SESSION_TODO.md
 SESSION_REPORT.md
